title: Star Wars: Battlefront 2 (Classic, 2005)

notes:
Everything works perfectly, you can also install Mods with the normal Wine (or by copying it into the Addon folder).
Loading rounds takes a bit more time than with the native version, but it's a bit faster than with the normal Wine

title: Star Wars: Battlefront 2 (Classic, 2005)

notes: No longer works - used to work with slight mouse(naga chroma) issues - now only menu works and crashes upon game join/create on any Proton version
title: Star Wars: Battlefront 2 (Classic, 2005)

notes: Performance could be a lot better, at 720p, ultra settings the game runs at 50-80fps. It sometimes hard-locks my system when attempting to leave a game forcing me to forcefully restart the machine.
title: Star Wars: Battlefront 2 (Classic, 2005)

notes: Perfect on most maps, maps with abundant water effects seem to have issues rendering though.
title: Star Wars: Battlefront 2 (Classic, 2005)

notes:
Runs perfectly.
Loading a game takes a bit longer than with Windows, but it is still fast enough.
Mods and (unofficial) patches work great, just install them with the normal WINE.
title: Star Wars: Battlefront 2 (Classic, 2005)

notes: Works perfectly out of the box. Loading times a bit long but running on old hardware so that might explain.
title: Star Wars: Battlefront 2 (Classic, 2005)

notes: Loading takes long, but it's the same on Windows. Not playable in highest settings with i5 integrated GPU.
title: Star Wars: Battlefront 2 (Classic, 2005)

notes: Weird glowing rendering artifact in/near water.  Otherwise plays perfectly (Just Like The Simulations™).  Mods work great, too (albeit with a bit of elbow grease sometimes, since they're not usually packaged with Wine/Proton in mind).
